design_philosophy: Educational gamification for students (11-18 years old). The app must feel approachable, energetic, and rewarding, utilizing a modern neo-brutalist soft look (chunky borders, solid drop shadows, and vibrant subject-specific colors) to encourage daily study habits.

typography.primary_font: System (Platform default: San Francisco on iOS, Roboto on Android)

motion.card_flip: Use Reanimated or Animated API. Interpolate rotateY from '0deg' to '180deg'. Back face must have backfaceVisibility: 'hidden' and absolute positioning.
motion.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 on press in, spring back to 1 on press out.

icons.usage: Use bold, rounded icons to match the playful gamified theme.

image_urls.description: Student studying, can be used for onboarding or motivation screens

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a React Native Expo application. DO NOT use tailwindcss classes, DO NOT use HTML tags (div, span, etc.), and DO NOT use shadcn/ui. Use ONLY React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView) and StyleSheet.create().
Implement the Leitner system logic (3 boxes) in the study session state.
Cards should display the opposite side of their last review, or definition first if new.
Implement a streak/XP tracker visible on the Home Screen.
Add 'data-testid' equivalent for React Native: use 'testID' prop for all interactive and key informational elements.
